description: Wild Blood Patch 1 (6 November 2023) — Tracking Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Tracking Changes

items.text: Now that a good number of players have made sufficient Tracking progress and overall activity for the feature is normalizing, all additional creatures which drop Silver have been removed. This means every Tracking target will now at least drop rare ingredients, with the chance of dropping artifacts as well.
In red zones, loot from Tracking will be protected for the Tracking party, as long as they engage in combat with the tracked creature

subitems.text: If the Tracking party did not engage in combat, loot will be protected for whoever kills the tracked creature
PvP-flagged players are still able to claim loot

items.text: Sylvian shield applied to allies during a channeling phase now removes all effects when either the shield breaks or the ally suffers a forced movement effect
Werewolf's bleed now ends when the fight ends

This means every Tracking target will now at least drop rare ingredients, with the chance of dropping artifacts as well. In red zones, loot from Tracking will be protected for the Tracking party, as long as they engage in combat with the tracked creature If the Tracking party did not engage in combat, loot will be protected for whoever kills the tracked creature PvP-flagged players are still able to claim loot Sylvian shield applied to allies during a channeling phase now removes all effects when either the shield breaks or the ally suffers a forced movement effect Werewolf's bleed now ends when the fight ends

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Consumables (food / potions) can now be equipped without triggering spell cooldowns
[DESKTOP] Moving mouse away from game window now closes active tooltips

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Consumables (food / potions) can now be equipped without triggering spell cooldowns [DESKTOP] Moving mouse away from game window now closes active tooltips

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frost Beam (all Frost Staffs) Damage: 28.72 → 31.5

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Knockback Distance: 12m (fixed distance)
Root: 2.5s → 2.2s
Damage: 75 → 125

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Separator (all Quarterstaffs) Knockback Distance: 12m (fixed distance) Root: 2.5s → 2.2s Damage: 75 → 125

subsections.heading: Shapeshifters

subitems.text: Energy Regeneration Factor: 6 → 4.5
Base Damage: 120 → 90 (Note: the true damage element of the third hit remains unchanged)
Cooldown: 10s → 12s
Panther invisibility warning effect is now clearer
The cast is now interruptible
Hit Delay: 1s → 1.2s
Damage: 370 → 350
Added a spell indication area for the hit delay

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifters Shapeshifter Staffs (All) Energy Regeneration Factor: 6 → 4.5 Sinister Swipes (Prowling Staff) Base Damage: 120 → 90 (Note: the true damage element of the third hit remains unchanged) Pounce (Prowling Staff) Cooldown: 10s → 12s Invisibility Passive (Prowling Staff) Panther invisibility warning effect is now clearer Judgment (Lightcaller) The cast is now interruptible Hit Delay: 1s → 1.2s Damage: 370 → 350 Added a spell indication area for the hit delay

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Range: 22m → 18m
Instead of Attack Speed Reduction, now reduces enemy damage by 30% for 4s
Damage: 20.48 → 62
Slow Duration: 5s → 4s

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Avalonian Beam (Cowl of Purity) Range: 22m → 18m Howl (Mercenary Hood) Instead of Attack Speed Reduction, now reduces enemy damage by 30% for 4s Damage: 20.48 → 62 Slow Duration: 5s → 4s

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: The channel is now interrupted when taking damage
Cooldown: 40s → 35s
Resistances: 0.28 → 0.3

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Mend Wounds (all Armors) The channel is now interrupted when taking damage Purging Shield (Mage Robe) Cooldown: 40s → 35s Resistances: 0.28 → 0.3

subsections.heading: Shoes

subitems.text: Cooldown: 30s → 45s
Transformation Delay: 1s → 1.5s
The ability can now be recast within 4s
Range: 10m → 7m
Damage and Healing Cast Increase per Blink: 15% → 8% (stacks up to 2 times now)

stats.name: Damage and Healing Cast Increase per Blink

subitems.text: Damage and Healing Cast Increase Duration: 4s → 4.5s

stats.name: Damage and Healing Cast Increase Duration

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Ethereal Form (Feyscale Sandals) Cooldown: 30s → 45s Transformation Delay: 1s → 1.5s Raging Blink (Stalker Shoes) The ability can now be recast within 4s Range: 10m → 7m Damage and Healing Cast Increase per Blink: 15% → 8% (stacks up to 2 times now) Damage and Healing Cast Increase Duration: 4s → 4.5s

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where it was possible to bypass anonymity in Mists via "Crafted by" and Awakened Weapons info
Guild Islands can now be abandoned again
Fixed issue where PvP-flagging would not be canceled by pressing the flagging button again
Fixed issue where cursor appearance only updated after mousing over an interactable object
Fixed issue where Smart Cluster Queue UI would disappear momentarily when closing world map or Destiny Board
Fixed issue where guild activities were not editable in Guild Recruitment settings
Improved visuals and feedback of Marketplace Quick Sell UI
Fixed issue where nurture bonus remained red even when animal could be nurtured again
Fixed issue where Hideout chest logs were not accessible
Fixed issue where players could move and switch windows with Gold Market UI open
Fixed issue where Shapeshifter Artifacts appeared in wrong Marketplace category
Fixed issue where T3 Prowling Staff showed specialization rewards even though none were available
Fixed issue where Deadly Swipe (Daggers) would not apply multiple stacks when hitting multiple enemies
Fixed issue where Protection of the Fiends (Demon Armor) could be interrupted

items.text: [MOBILE] Fixed issue where some mount skins displayed incorrectly
Fixed issue where nonlethal 20v20 Crystal League matches awarded Might
All book chests now contain at least one Tome of Insight
Fixed issue where server restarted between connection loss and reconnect
Fixed issue where different tiers of Sticky Potions could stack damage debuffs
Gate Cores in Avalonian Dungeons are now attackable by all weapon types
Fixed issue where spell area summoned by the Dryad Guardian were invisible
Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, VFX, and localization fixes
